propositions: Create a runbook documenting the post-merge main CI detector that runs the full suite on every push to main after Gerrit replicates the submit to the GitHub mirror.
Document the manual-revert procedure: confirm-not-flake, identify the culprit change, revert through Gerrit's two-vote submit gate, confirm green, and re-land.
Document that auto-revert is deliberately NOT built and should be revisited only if red-main recurs.
Cross-link the runbook from ADR 0047 (replacing its 'runbook to follow' placeholder) and from CONTRIBUTING.md's post-merge safety-net note.
Ensure the docs-index / dead-link checker passes for the new runbook.
